role_summary: the senior finance manager leads finance strategy execution, complex reporting, and team  management while partne ring with senior leadership.
responsibilities: • lead finance team and oversee financial operations   • drive budgeting, forecasting, and long -term financial planning   • review financial statements and management reports   • monitor cash flow, working capital, and cost optimization   • ensure regulatory and statutory compliance   • act as a key business partner to senior management
qualifications: • ca with significant post -qualification experience   • strong leadership and stakeholder management skills   • advanced financia l analysis and strategic planning expertise
